Metadata.homeDescription: Boutique digital atelier — marketing, web experiences, and e‑commerce.
Metadata.servicesDescription: Digital marketing, web design and architecture, flagship commerce, SEO and editorial content.
Metadata.aboutDescription: The digital atelier — philosophy, collective, and method.
Metadata.contactDescription: Start a dialogue with the atelier.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.body: The link may be broken or the page was removed.

Home.heroLead: We are a boutique atelier for digital experiences. We combine architectural precision with high-fashion aesthetics to craft your unique online identity.
Home.heroImageAlt: Abstract golden light in a dark void
Home.expertiseAside: We treat every project as a unique work of art, balancing form and function.
Home.exp1Body: Data-led strategies that turn views into loyal clients. We focus on ROI and sustainable brand growth.
Home.exp2Body: We craft flawless visual experiences that tell a story. Beauty that works on every screen.
Home.exp3Body: From first visit to purchase. Sales channels that feel luxurious and secure.
Home.exp4Body: Own your position at the top. Deep analysis and technical excellence for maximum visibility.
Home.processStep01Body: Every project begins with a deep dive into your brand. We analyse the market, define goals, and map the path to digital excellence.
Home.processStep02Body: We turn concepts into visual reality, focusing on intuition and aesthetics that resonate with your audience.
Home.processStep03Body: We use modern technologies to ensure speed, security, and scalability for your digital product.
Home.processStep04Body: Launch is only the beginning. We continuously track performance and refine details for maximum impact.
Home.finalCtaLead: Your vision deserves to be presented at the highest level. Reach out for a complimentary consultation.

About.heroLead: We reject the templated. We embrace the intentional. Harmony is a creative sanctuary where architectural precision meets digital innovation.
About.philosophy1Body: We find beauty in the unexpected balance of elements.
About.philosophy2Body: Every pixel serves a functional and aesthetic purpose.
About.philosophy3Body: Refinement that speaks through quality, not volume.
About.brunoBio: Architect turned digital designer, Bruno Colic brings structural rigor to every experience.
About.quoteBefore: "Design is not what we see, it is the
About.quoteAfter: of how it exists in space."
About.method1Body: We begin by deconstructing your brand to its molecular level, understanding the heritage and vision that drive it.
About.method2Body: Every interface is hand-crafted and debated, ensuring the balance of space and content is perfect.
About.method3Body: The final polish involves micro-interactions and motion that feel as smooth as silk and as solid as stone.

Services.heroLead: In our atelier, we don't just build websites; we curate digital legacies. Every pixel is intentional, every line of code structural.
Services.s1Quote: "Luxury is not about being noticed, it's about being remembered."
Services.s1Block1Body: Aligning your brand with the pinnacle of industry standards through data-driven narratives.
Services.s1Block2Body: Sophisticated journeys that turn quiet interest into enduring loyalty.
Services.s2Lead: Our web design treats the browser as a gallery. Rhythmic asymmetry and layered panels create a sense of expansion.
Services.s3Aside: Commerce as an editorial experience through high-performance e‑commerce engines.
Services.s3CardMainBody: Custom Shopify and headless solutions for high-volume boutiques and luxury retailers.
Services.s3Small1Body: Frictionless, secure flows aligned with your brand's prestige.
Services.s3Small2Body: Integration with atelier logistics and ERP systems.
Services.s4Block1Body: We don't chase algorithms; we command them. SEO built on semantic depth and technical precision.
Services.s4Block2Body: Narratives with the weight of a heritage publication — content that educates, inspires, and converts.

Contact.pageLead: Our atelier operates on intentionality and precision. Whether you are starting a new project or seeking an aesthetic consultation, our doors are open.
Contact.mapAlt: Monochrome map of Slavonski Brod city centre
Contact.formThanks: Thank you. We will respond shortly. (Backend delivery can be wired when ready.)

Footer.tagline: We inspire digital excellence through timeless design and innovative technology.
